evidence.snippet:
### **[Motors, Resolvers and Actuators](/engineeredsolutions/motorsResolvers/Default.aspx)**
Brushless DC motors, AC induction motors, resolvers, and actuators. For extreme performance in tough environments including munitions, unmanned aerial vehicles, downhole oil & gas, and space satellites.

items.notes: Brushless DC motors, stepper motors, AC motors, resolvers, and actuator assemblies explicitly listed for 'unmanned aerial vehicles' among target applications.

evidence.snippet:
### **[Radio Frequency (RF) Switch Products](/engineeredsolutions/RF/Default.aspx)**
Industry-leading Radio Frequency (RF) electromechanical switch products and other RF devices. For communications, radar, electronic warfare, data center, and automated test equipment applications.

items.notes: RF electromechanical switch products for communications and radar applications.

evidence.snippet: Founded in 1849, Ducommun is the oldest continuing-operating company headquartered in the State of California. Through our long heritage, we have continuously adapted to provide our customers with innovative, scalable solutions to tough challenges.

headquarters.notes: Corpus only specifies 'State of California'; city-level address not disclosed in fetched pages. Facilities contact page (skipped) likely has more detail.

evidence.snippet:
### **[Motors, Resolvers and Actuators](/engineeredsolutions/motorsResolvers/Default.aspx)**
Brushless DC motors, AC induction motors, resolvers, and actuators. For extreme performance in tough environments including munitions, unmanned aerial vehicles, downhole oil & gas, and space satellites.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Motors, resolvers, and actuators are explicitly offered for unmanned aerial vehicles. Ducommun is a broad aerospace/defense manufacturer; UAV is one of several target markets, but the explicit product-level callout distinguishes them from broad_industrial.

items.name: FastFin® systems
items.product_type: aerodynamic fin/stabilizer systems for rotary-wing aircraft

evidence.snippet:
### **[Aerodynamic Systems](https://www.blraerospace.com)**
Leading provider of aerodynamic systems that enhance the productivity, performance and safety of rotary- and fixed-wing aircraft on commercial and military platforms. Comprehensive portfolio of products includes FastFin® systems, winglet systems, propellers and flow modifiers.

tagline: Brushless DC motors, stepper motors, high-precision resolvers, RF switches, and aerodynamic stabilization systems (FastFin®) for defense and aerospace platforms. In-house production across propulsion, sensors, communications, and structures. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence of major BAE Systems supplier relationship but limited unmanned-systems program visibility.
